blocker: No Datadog account / live incident access, so this is a sourced claims-and-design analysis, not an empirical head-to-head.
one_line: Sourced, fair analysis of Datadog Bits AI SRE (6 cited sources, 18-claim validated table): summarizes claims, buckets gaps into acknowledged/not-disclosed/structural, and maps each to SRE-Degrees differentiators (mechanism-level reward, -0.60 trap penalty, escalation/graduation) with code citations; validate.py passes.
